name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: Euless, TX location of Loanstar Title Loans at 412 S Industrial Blvd offers same-day title loans with flexible repayment and quick approval.
description_long:
Loanstar Title Loans operates at 412 S Industrial Blvd in Euless, TX, in a standalone storefront accessible via South Industrial Boulevard. The location is open Monday through Friday from 10am to 6pm and Saturday from 9am to 2pm, closed Sundays.

At this Euless, TX location, customers can apply for title loans, auto equity loans, and short-term cash solutions. Call 817-358-1732 to speak with a loan officer about your options, or visit the store for in-person service and document review.

Euless residents and North Texas borrowers use Loanstar Title Loans when they need fast cash against their vehicle's title. Bring a government-issued ID, proof of residency, vehicle title, and insurance information. The store provides same-day approval and funding for qualified borrowers.
pros: Loans up to $10,000 available — significantly higher than typical payday loans
Minimal qualification requirements: only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title needed
Multiple payment methods accepted including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
25-year operating history demonstrates established business longevity
Multiple convenient locations across Dallas-Fort Worth area
Published fee schedules for transparency on costs for $600, $1,200, and $2,000 loans
Licensed and regulated with OCCC compliance noted on website
cons: Title loans typically carry very high APRs — specific rates not disclosed on website
Vehicle repossession risk if loan defaults, creating significant personal transportation consequences
No information provided about loan terms, repayment periods, or actual APR ranges
Single Fort Worth location website returned 404 error, suggesting potential website management issues
Limited details on alternative repayment options or hardship provisions if borrower faces difficulties
best_for: Vehicle owners with immediate cash needs ($1,000-$10,000) and no access to traditional credit
Consumers who need funds faster than personal loan approval timelines allow
Borrowers with poor credit history who cannot qualify for unsecured personal loans or credit cards
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for vehicle owners facing urgent cash needs of $1,000-$10,000 who have exhausted traditional lending options and own a vehicle with clear title. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost emergency debt products with APRs typically far exceeding 36%, and borrowers risk vehicle repossession if they cannot repay — making this appropriate only when no lower-cost alternatives exist and the borrower can reliably repay quickly.
services: Multiple installment loan options with published fee schedules
Payment processing via cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Multi-location access across Texas (Fort Worth, Haltom City, Richland Hills, Burleson)
Fee disclosure documents for various loan amounts
In-person loan processing at physical locations
meta_description: Loanstar Title Loans at 412 S Industrial Blvd, Euless, TX. Fast same-day title loans with flexible repayment and quick approval.
